signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual CPI inflation rose to 2
signals.raw: South Korea's March 2026 annual CPI inflation rose to 2.2% YoY (from 2.0% in Feb), below market consensus of 2.3-2.4% due to oil prices offset by government measures like fuel caps.**[1][2]
